channel.title: Awesome Search KG
channel.description: Last 10 notes on Awesome Search KG

item.title: Doug Turnbull
item.description: Doug Turnbull Co-founder of OpenSource Connections (OSC); co-author of Relevant Search (O’Reilly).

item.title: History
item.description: Awesome Search — Note History Chronological log of notes added to this knowledge graph. Newest first.

item.title: ColPali & Elasticsearch: How to Search Complex Documents
item.description: ColPali & Elasticsearch: How to Search Complex Documents Part 1 of Elastic’s ColPali series.

item.title: Frontier of Search
item.description: Frontier of Search A year-by-year index of what counts as the leading edge of search and retrieval.

item.title: Late Interaction in Elasticsearch
item.description: Late Interaction in Elasticsearch How Late Interaction models — ColBERT for text, ColPali for document images — are indexed, scored, and scaled inside Elasticsearch.

item.title: Bonsai
item.description: Bonsai Bonsai (bonsai.io) is a managed OpenSearch / Elasticsearch hosting provider.

item.title: Hornet
item.description: Hornet What They Build Hornet (hornet.dev) is a retrieval infrastructure company focused on high-precision context delivery for agentic AI systems.

item.title: SID.ai
item.description: SID.ai SID.ai builds purpose-built agentic LLMs for search and reranking — smaller, specialized models trained specifically on the rewrite / retrieve / rerank loop rather than general-purpose tool use.

item.title: Vespa
item.description: Vespa What They Build Vespa is an open-source big data serving engine originally developed by Yahoo and now maintained as an independent open-source project (vespa.ai).

item.title: Agentic Query Workload
item.description: Agentic Query Workload Definition The agentic query workload is the distinct shape of demand that autonomous agents place on retrieval systems — qualitatively different from the human search workload that current infrastructure was tuned for.
